headline: Software Engineering · ML/AI · Backend / Tooling
role: Software Engineer / Backend / ML-Data / Technical Tooling
paragraphs: I am submitting this general cover letter for software engineering opportunities through Barcelona Activa. I am currently finishing Computer Science specialization on Software Engineering at Universitat Oberta de Catalunya, with a Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence mention, and I am focusing my professional transition toward backend engineering, ML/data systems, technical tooling, automation, and applied AI workflows.

My technical base includes Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, SQL, Python, Linux, Git, GitHub Actions, LaTeX, Markdown, static publishing, and repository-based technical documentation. My current public work combines software engineering practice with agentic workflow systems, buildable documents, static project pages, and structured technical reports.

Before engineering, I worked for 15 years in banking and insurance operations. That background gives me practical experience with regulated processes, data quality, traceability, case triage, stakeholder communication, customer-facing problem resolution, and operational pressure. I consider that background especially useful for engineering teams building systems where reliability, documentation, and business rules matter.

I am looking for a first stable software engineering opportunity in Barcelona or hybrid/remote from Barcelona. I am especially interested in roles where I can contribute to backend systems, internal tools, data/ML workflows, platform support, automation, or technically demanding documentation and validation work.
I would welcome the opportunity to discuss positions where my software engineering training, ML/AI direction, technical tooling practice, and regulated-domain background can be useful.
public_note: General cover letter for Barcelona Activa job-search opportunities. Portfolio, GitHub, and LinkedIn links are included for quick verification.
parser_summary: Dídac Llorens / Didac Llorens;  Barcelona-based UOC Software Engineering and Computer Science graduate mention in Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence. Target roles: Software Engineer, Backend Engineer, ML Engineer, Data Engineer, MLOps junior, Applied AI Engineer, Technical Tooling Engineer, Developer Tooling, Platform Engineering, Automation. Stack: Java, Spring Boot, REST APIs, SQL, Python, Linux, Git, GitHub Actions, LaTeX, Markdown, static sites, technical documentation. Public projects: AgenticCareerBoost, P3CTeX, p3cTeX-UMLST, IronBank. Domain background: 15 years banking and insurance operations, regulated environments, data quality, traceability, audit habits, stakeholder communication, case triage, operational reliability.
